title: ለኔ የደረገው ሚካኤል ብዙ ነው
lyrics:
ለኔ የደረገው ሚካኤል ብዙ ነው (፪)
ከእግዚአብሔር ተልኮ ድንቅ ነገር አደረገልኝ
አፅነኝና እርዳት ሚካኤል ሆነኝ

ታናሽ ብላቴና ስምክህን የማልረሳ
ደግፈኝ ሚካኤል ስውድቅ እንድነሳ
ስምህን በልቤ ፅላት እፅፋለሁ
በክንፎች ጥለ ዛሬም አርፈለሁ

ወለታ እንዳይጠፋ ሁሌም ከሀሰቤ
ሚካኤል ሰልለይ ፍቅርህን ከልቤ
አንተ የዋህ መለአክ የርግብ አምሰል
የብርሃን አክሊል ነህ ሚካኤል ሃያል

ለኔ ያለው ፍቅር በአይኔ አይቼዋለሁ
ውለታህን ሳስብ እጅግ አደንቀለሁ
በነፍስም በሥጋ ነህ መታመኛዬ
የሚጠብቀኝ መከታ ጋሸዬ

ስወጣ ስገባ ከልሎኝ ከእንቅፋት
ሚካኤል ጠብቀኝ ከሚገጠመኝ ጥፋት
ደግ ነው ሚካኤል ፍቅሩ በዝቶልኛል
በዘመኔ ሁሉ እርሱ ይረደኛል
transliterationLyrics:
Lene yederegew Mikaiel bizu new (2)
KeEgziabhier telko dink neger aderegelign
Atsenegnna erdat Mikaiel honegn

Tanash blatenna smkehn yemalresa
Degfegn Mikaiel swdqi endenesa
Smhen belbie tslat itsfalehu
Bekinfoch tile zarem arefelehu

Weleta endaytefa hulem kehasbie
Mikaiel selley fiqren kelbie
Ante yewah melaek yergib amsel
Yebrhan aklil neh Mikaiel hayal

Lene yalew fiqer beayne aychewalehu
Weletahn sasib ejig adenqelehu
Benefsim besga neh metamenyaye
Yemit'ebeqegn meketta gasheye

Seweta sigeiba kellogn keenkifat
Mikaiel tebqegn kemigetamgn tifat
Deg new Mikaiel fiqru beztolegnal
Bezemenie hulu ersu yiredagnal
meaning: This mezmur is a testimony of gratitude for the many things Saint Michael has done in the life of the believer. It reflects a deep personal relationship with him, recognizing his help, protection, and guidance from a young age. The chant emphasizes remembering his name, trusting in his covering wings, and relying on him as a protector in both spiritual and physical life. It also expresses amazement at his love and faithfulness, acknowledging that throughout every moment—going out and coming in—he continues to guard and support the believer.

title: ታላቁ መልዐክ ሚካኤል ይነግሳል
lyrics:
ታላቁ መልዐክ ሚካኤል ይነግሳል
በእልልታ ይንግሳል በዝማሬ ይነግሳል
ታላቁ መልዐክ ሚካኤል ይነግሳል

የማይቋረጥ ልዩ ምስጋና
አለኝ ሚካኤል ለክብርህ ገና
ንገስ በእልልታ ታላቅ ነህ እና
ህዝቤን ልትረዳ ወጥተሃል እና

ታላቁ መልዐክ ሚካኤል ይነግሳል
ይነግሳል በእልልታ ይንግሳል በዝማሬ ይነግሳል
ታላቁ መልዐክ ሚካኤል ይነግሳል

መጣ ከሰማይ በልዩ ግርማ
አህያ አየችው ከበልዓም ቀድማ
ለታላቅ ክብሩ ሰገደችለት
አየ በልዓም አይኑ ሲከፈት

አይሰራም መርገም በአምላክ ህዝብ ላይ
አንተን ሊቋቋም መጥቷል ከሰማይ
ቃሉ በአማረ ልዩ ምስጋና
ታላቁ መልዐክ ሚካኤል ይነግሳልና

ይነግሳል በእልልታ ይንግሳል በዝማሬ ይነግሳል
ታላቁ መልዐክ ሚካኤል ይነግሳል
transliterationLyrics:
Talaku melaek Mikaiel yinegesal
Be'illilta yingesal bezemare yinegesal
Talaku melaek Mikaiel yinegesal

Yemaykwaret liyu misgana
Alegn Mikaiel lekibirih gena
Niges be'illilta talak neh ena
Hizbien litreda wetahaleh ena

Talaku melaek Mikaiel yinegesal
Yinegesal be'illilta yingesal bezemare yinegesal
Talaku melaek Mikaiel yinegesal

Meta kesemay beliyu girma
Ahiya aychew kebelam qedma
Letalak kbiru segedechilet
Aye belam aynu sikfet

Ayseram mergem beamalak hizb lay
Ante litqaqwam metah kesemay
Qalu beamare liyu misgana
Talaku melaek Mikaiel yinegesalna

Yinegesal be'illilta yingesal bezemare yinegesal
Talaku melaek Mikaiel yinegesal
meaning: This mezmur proclaims the greatness and authority of Saint Michael the Archangel, declaring that he reigns with joy, praise, and heavenly glory. It celebrates him as a powerful servant sent from heaven to defend God's people and defeat evil. The chant references biblical imagery such as the story of Balaam, emphasizing that no curse can prevail against those protected by God. Overall, it is a song of victory, praise, and honor, exalting Saint Michael as a mighty defender who reigns through divine power and intercession.

title: እንደ እግዚአብሔር ያለ ማንም የለምና
lyrics:
እንደ እግዚአብሔር ያለ ማንም የለምና
እልል በሉ ቁሙ ለምስጋና /2/

ባሕር ተከፈለ እስኪታይ መሬቱ
ፈርዖን ወደቀ አልሰራም ትምክህቱ
ደካሞቹም ጸንተው ተራመዱ
ኃይለኞቹም ይኸው ተዋረዱ

የኢያሪኮ ቅጥር የማይደፈረው
ይኸው ፈራርሶ የሰው እጅ ሳይነካው
ኃይለኞቹም ቢበረታቱብን
እንጸናለን በእርሱ ተደግፈን

የተወረወረው የጠላታችን ጦር
ሜዳ ላይ ወደቀ ጋሻ ሆኖ እግዚአብሔር
ለሥላሴ ይድረስ ምስጋናችን
ተሸነፈ አዳኝ ጠላታችን

ባሕር ላይ ሲራመድ ሞገስ አለው እርሱ
በግርማው ሲነሳ ጸጥ ይላል ነፋሱ
የድንግል ልጅ እኛ የምናመልከው
መድሃኒአለም የለም የሚሳነው
transliterationLyrics:
Ende Egziabher yale manem yelemna
Elel belu kumu lemesgana /2/

Baher tekefele eskitay meretu
Fereon wedeke alseram timkhetu
Dekamochum tsentew teramedu
Haylegnochum yehew tewaredu

Yeyariko kiter yemaydeferew
Yehew ferarese yesew ej saynekaw
Haylegnochum bibertatuben
Entsenalen bersu tedegfen

Yetewerewerew yetelatachen tor
Meda lay wedeke gasha hono Egziabher
LeSilassie yedres mesganachen
Teshenefe adagn telatachen

Baher lay siramed moges alew ersu
Begrmaw sinesa tset yelal nifasu
YeDingel lij egna menamelkew
Medhanialem yelem misanew
meaning: This mezmur glorifies the unmatched power of God, declaring that there is none like Him. It recalls mighty biblical miracles such as the parting of the Red Sea, the fall of Pharaoh, and the collapse of Jericho's walls, showing that God lifts the weak and humbles the strong. It also emphasizes His protection against enemies and His authority over nature. The chant ultimately calls believers to stand in praise, recognizing that nothing is impossible for God, the Savior of the world.

title: እመቤቴ የአምላክ እናት
lyrics:
እመቤቴ የአምላክ እናት ላመስግንሽ ቀን ከሌሊት
ለልጅሽም ክብር ውዳሴ ታቀርባለች ዘወትር ነፍሴ (2)

ልቤ ተነሳሳ ተቀኘ ለክብርሽ
በፍጹም ትህትና ሊያመሰግንሽ
ጽዮን መጠጊያ ነሽ የአብርሃም ድንኳን
የታጠረች ተክል እመ ብዙሃን

የለመለመች መስክ አምላክ የመረጣት
የጽላቱ ኪዳን ታቦቱ ድንግል ናት
የሰማይ የምድር ንግሥት ናትና
ክብር ይገባታል ዘወትር ጠዋት ማታ

አደራሽን ማርያም የሁሉ እናት
በምልጃሽ አስቢኝ ኋላ ስራቆት
ያንን የእሳት ባሕር አሻግርኝ ድንግል ሆይ
እንዳልወድቅ እንዳልሞት ከቶ እንዳላይ ስቃይ
transliterationLyrics:
Emebete yamlak enat lamesignish ken kelelit
Lelijishim kibir widase takeribalech zewetir nefse (2)

Libe tenesasa tekenye lekibirish
Befitsum tihitina liyamesegenish
Tsiyon metegiya nesh yeabrham dinkwan
Yetaterech tekl eme bezuhan

Yelemelemeche mesk amlak yemeretat
Yetsilatu kidan tabotu dingil nat
Yesemay yemidir nigist natina
Kibir yigebatal zewetir tewat mata

Aderashin Mariyam yehulu enat
Bemeljash asibign hwala sirakot
Yanin yeisat bahir ashagirign dingil hoy
Endalwedik endalmot keto endalay sikay
meaning: This mezmur is a heartfelt praise to the Virgin Mary, honoring her as the Mother of God and the Queen of heaven and earth. It expresses a desire to continually glorify her and her Son, recognizing her humility, purity, and chosen role as the dwelling place of God. The chant also reflects deep reliance on her intercession, asking her to guide and protect believers through trials and lead them safely through spiritual struggles. It emphasizes devotion, humility, and trust in her motherly care.
